creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #16)
Can you elaborate on this?

You have both reverse dependency by at least libpng and 20+ direct consumers that utilizes CMake.

Build times on my Tigerlake laptop show that it's quite a bit faster too:
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
        18.08s real             58.16s user             9.79s sys

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
        7.90s real              34.34s user             2.25s sys
